title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.726 - Nonpayment of premiums, effect of
text:
376.726.  Nonpayment of premiums, effect of. — 1.  Nonpayment of premiums within thirty-one days after the date required under the terms of any guaranteed, assumed, alternative or reissued policy or contract or substitute coverage shall terminate the association's obligations under such policy, contract, or coverage under sections 376.715 to 376.758 with respect to such policy, contract, or coverage, except with respect to any claims incurred or any net cash surrender value which may be due in accordance with the provisions of sections 376.715 to 376.758.
  2.  Premiums due for coverage after entry of an order of liquidation of an insolvent insurer shall belong to and be payable at the direction of the association, and the association shall be liable for unearned premiums due to policy or contract owners arising after the entry of such order.
(L. 1988 S.B. 430 § 9, A.L. 2018 H.B. 1690)
